recent_rows.summary: Documented Phase 4 product reconciliation matrix across Codex Capsule Chat, Action Gateway, MCP Action, data-zip Custom GPT product, local cockpit, and full ION pipeline.
Added candidate Assistant Work route metadata to Action Gateway validate-only responses; held MCP route tool for explicit tool-policy/schema gate.

Planned candidate-domain operation ladder for assistant-work surfaces: candidate domains/agents/templates/routes may operate under containment for classification, proof shaping, route preview, trace display, and diagnost

Implemented candidate-domain lifecycle gate: added provisional protocol, candidate lifecycle registry, scorecards, promotion proposal draft, and route compiler filtering for inactive/rejected/archived/draft routes.
Formalized root source lanes for workpackets, diffs, and ION_sandbox: added lane READMEs, machine-readable indexes, consolidated source-lane policy, receipt, and git hygiene for sandbox snapshots.

summaries.summary: Updated cockpit login password and pre-allowed crinkedart Google account
Rebuilt dual Codex chat into JOC-style cockpit workbench with command rail and context drawers
Added Codex Capsule Operating Protocol: Capsule ION is the minified fallback/basic ops kernel while full ION Codex CLI chat is rebuilt.
Corrected Codex chat product direction to one Capsule Codex chat with bounded full-ION comms adapter.
Added opt-in chat execution bridge from Codex Capsule chat turns to existing Codex work queue.
Extracted active Codex Chat app shell into dedicated UI renderer module.
Removed obsolete in-file Codex chat HTML/CSS renderer blocks after UI extraction.
Improved Codex Chat Timeline and Agents drawers from existing trace and broker data.
Implemented ION skill activation layer for Codex Chat: skills activate workflows while templates remain proof gates.
Implemented Codex Chat Engine core: response modes, native ION lenses, GPT-5.5 chat route, and queue metadata handoff.

Implemented source-ref drilldown and compact selected-turn trace linking in Codex Chat: source refs and carrier phase events are selectable, update the selected-node panel, and hig

Added grouped source-reference drilldown and route edge summaries to Codex Chat: source refs now expose grouped filters and lanes, route graph shows type counts before detailed edg
Improved Codex Chat response-carrier prompt quality: mounted Hot Context and context package selector, removed hard-coded root assumption, strengthened direct-answer continuity rul
Added response-run observability to Codex Chat: recent response carrier run packets are projected into the active model and Evidence/Runs inspector with prompt, return, event, stdo
Documented Phase 4 product reconciliation matrix across Codex Capsule Chat, Action Gateway, MCP Action, data-zip Custom GPT product, local cockpit, and full ION pipeline.
Added candidate Assistant Work route metadata to Action Gateway validate-only responses; held MCP route tool for explicit tool-policy/schema gate.

Implemented candidate-domain lifecycle gate: added provisional protocol, candidate lifecycle registry, scorecards, promotion proposal draft, and route compiler filtering for inacti
